turns.speaker: openclaw
turns.message: OpenClaw starts a dry-run Hermes dialogue session from green task-dialoguer coverage.
turns.output_contract: Return bounded next-task reasoning without approval, registry writes, SQLite writes, worker execution, or model invocation.

turns.speaker: hermes
turns.message: Hermes recommends moving from dialogue coverage into controlled executor intake coverage.
turns.output_contract: Keep the recommendation artifact-only and require operator approval before any real execution.

flow_steps: OpenClaw reads the task-dialoguer status summary coverage artifact.
OpenClaw opens a deterministic dry-run dialogue session for Hermes.
Hermes returns a bounded recommendation using the existing coverage and handoff contracts.
OpenClaw records the recommended flow, guardrails, and next validation step as an artifact.
OpenClaw keeps real registry, SQLite, worker, and model paths disabled until approval.
optimization_steps: Keep dialogue context scoped to the current flow id and source artifact.
Require coverage_ratio=1 before any controlled executor intake step.
Keep operator approval separate from generated dialogue or handoff artifacts.
Prefer read-only coverage, preflight, release-summary, and rollback artifacts before activation.
Keep model invocation reference-only until an explicit model-caller gate exists.
Write every run result as a rollbackable artifact under reports/hermes-agent/state.

next_decision.recommended_task: Run controlled executor intake coverage after the intake validator is green.
next_decision.prerequisite: task-dialoguer status summary coverage must stay green with all write and model paths disabled

blocked_actions: treating controlled dialogue as operator approval
starting real execution from controlled dialogue
running worker execution from controlled dialogue
invoking a model from controlled dialogue
rollback_path: Discard this dry-run controlled dialogue executor session artifact; it did not persist registry, SQLite, worker, model, approval, or execution state.
next_safe_task: Run controlled executor intake coverage after the intake validator is green.
